_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. The exhaustive per-content history lives in scripts/content-backlog.json (one detailed entry per shipped module); this file keeps only the current snapshot plus the balance method.

observed.note: AFFIX-BATCH-4 (2026-07-16): added the 'Craft of the Forgemasters' loot batch to js/stats.js — 4 prefixes (Runeworked, Keen-Edged, Tempered, Masterforged) + 4 suffixes (of the Forge, of the Anvil, of the Quenching, of the Grand Smith), a FIFTH coherent loot set themed to the legendary SMITHS/FORGES that craft gear — a fresh motif distinct from Spoils (enemy families), Trophies (hero prowess) and Relics (apex mechanics): it names HOW a legendary artifact is MADE, fitting a game whose win is a full legendary set. Auto-reachable: makeItem draws rng across the full pre/suf arrays so pushing onto them is the only wiring (pool now 33 prefixes / 39 suffixes); affixes never render as tiles, so scene.js spriteMap / hero.js creaturesAndItemsMap are UNTOUCHED (zero symbol-crash risk). BALANCE: copied the proven-neutral profile rather than re-deriving it — category totals str16/agi7/hp15/hit3/crit8/armor3/def6 (comp 59/26/16) mirror the neutral 'Trophies of the Arena' (59/25/16); crit total held to 8 spread over offense affixes and never co-located with concentrated hp (only Runeworked carries a token hp1); def>=armor; two defensive archetypes (Tempered, of the Quenching) carry the ~15% armor/def share; luck (idx2) + magicFind (idx8) stay 0 (inert padding); gScore peaks at 9 (Runeworked), below the pool's 10 ceiling. ITERATION — a first draft gave the crown suffix 'of the Grand Smith' an inert crit2 where the neutral Relics crown 'of the Titan' carries a real hp3; an isolated 24k-run A/B (off a clean origin/main worktree, base vs base+batch, 10 parallel node workers) measured that draft -1.05pt / z=-2.39 (mildly HARDER, just outside the |z|<1.96 neutral bar), and an equipped-gear probe at realms 6-7 traced it to the frequently-equipped gScore-8 crown delivering ~hp3 LESS survivability per equip. Swapping the crown's crit2 -> hp3 (matching of the Titan) and relocating those 2 crit onto no-hp offense affixes (Runeworked crit1->2, of the Forge crit2->3) to keep crit total 8 recentred it: the shipped design measured base 37.31% vs batch 37.57% (+0.27pt, z=0.60 at 24000 runs/arm) — NEUTRAL — and the probe confirmed the crown fix restored ~+2.6 equipped HP at a neutral win rate. Browser-verified on dist/ (headless): 0 console errors, all 8 affixes exist in the pool and build items cleanly (4000 random makeItem draws + 8 forced legendaries), a 'Legendary Schimitar of the Grand Smith' auto-equips through the real gScore path and renders the stat pane, and the render path across realms 1-9 paints every biome (halls/frost/blight/ember) and the full apex rotation B/B/B/B/T/W/S/M/T without a single thrown error. Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` read 37.5% (2249/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms across all biomes: halls 400, frost 1600, blight 3600, ember 20800). JS-all 27.09KB brotli (<=55KB). NEW CARRIED-FORWARD LOOT GOTCHA: a batch whose CATEGORY TOTALS match the neutral profile can STILL drift ~1pt if a high-gScore, frequently-equipped affix (especially the crown all-rounder) spends its budget on inert crit instead of honest hp/str/agi — the crown must carry REAL value (copy of the Titan: str/agi + hp, no crit). Verify the crown SPECIFICALLY with the equipped-gear probe, not just the batch totals. The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base (js/enemy.js) remains the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
